steps.t: Durin has called for your aid in the final battle with Gorgar the Ruthless. Use the Instance Finder to enter Amdân Dammul, the Bloody Threshold on any…
The final battle for Gundabad is about to begin. You should speak to Durin inside Amdân Dammul, the Bloody Threshold.
The Orcs' trap has been sprung! You should speak to Durin inside Amdân Dammul, the Bloody Threshold.
Gorgar has sprung a trap and forces you and your dwarf allies to fight in his arena. You should fight in Gorgar's arena and survive!
The day is won, but Hrímil Frost-heart has returned and claimed Gundabad! You should talk to Durin.
